search_document:
User Request: Products per supplier.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Products per Supplier
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of products across different suppliers
Title: Supplier Overview
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers with their product counts
Title: Total Products
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of products available

sql_queries.title: Products per Supplier
sql_queries.description: Distribution of products across different suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Suppliers.CompanyName, COUNT(Products.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Suppliers JOIN Products ON Suppliers.SupplierID = Products.SupplierID GROUP BY Suppliers.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Supplier Overview
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers with their product counts
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Suppliers.SupplierID, Suppliers.CompanyName, COUNT(Products.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Suppliers LEFT JOIN Products ON Suppliers.SupplierID = Products.SupplierID GROUP BY Suppliers.SupplierID, Suppliers.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Total Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Products
